writingGuidelines.tone: Expert but accessible. Not promotional. Honest about cons. Use data to support claims.
writingGuidelines.pov: First-person plural (we/our). 'We tested', 'Our team found', 'We recommend'.
eeatSignals: Include author bio with gambling industry credentials
Cite state regulator websites and official sources
Include 'last updated' date on all pages
Link to responsible gambling resources (NCPG, state helplines)
Include factual data (tax rates, launch dates, regulator names)
complianceNotes: Include age requirement (18+ or 21+ per state)
Do NOT promote operators in states where they are not licensed
